description: A foreman needs to check the on-site inventory of copper pipe to ensure there is enough for the next week's plumbing work.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the current inventory level for '1-inch Copper Pipe' from the inventory management system.

expected_outcome.value: System shows 500 feet of pipe in inventory.

nodes.task_description: Compare the on-hand quantity with the forecasted need of 600 feet for the upcoming week.

expected_outcome.value: Agent identifies a shortfall of 100 feet.

nodes.task_description: Create a purchase order for an additional 200 feet of pipe to cover the shortfall and provide a buffer.

expected_outcome.value: A new PO is created to prevent a material shortage.
